item.title: Testing out Kourtney Kardashians FAVOURITE foundation!
item.description: Smitha Deepak tries Kourtney Kardashian's favorite foundation and shares her take on the product.

item.title: Hydration for a Smooth Makeup Base
item.description: Smitha Deepak shares how a gel cream helps keep skin hydrated for a smooth makeup look all day.

media:content.media:title: Hydration for a Smooth Makeup Base
media:content.media:description: Smitha Deepak shares how a gel cream helps keep skin hydrated for a smooth makeup look all day.

item.title: I love this natural finish w/ NO "cake" foundation!
item.description: Smitha Deepak highlights a natural-looking foundation finish with a lightweight feel.

media:content.media:title: I love this natural finish w/ NO "cake" foundation!
media:content.media:description: Smitha Deepak highlights a natural-looking foundation finish with a lightweight feel.

item.title: A simple concealer chilling tip
item.description: A quick beauty tip: chill concealer for 10 minutes before use for a tackier, full-coverage finish.

media:content.media:title: A simple concealer chilling tip
media:content.media:description: A quick beauty tip: chill concealer for 10 minutes before use for a tackier, full-coverage finish.

item.title: You'll ace this eye look the 1st time!

media:content.media:title: You'll ace this eye look the 1st time!
media:content.media:description: Smitha Deepak shares a simple eye look tutorial that’s easy to follow and recreate.

item.title: Olive Skin-Friendly Tints for a Natural Look
item.description: Olive skin-friendly tints can help skin look real, smooth, and not cakey on camera.

media:content.media:title: Olive Skin-Friendly Tints for a Natural Look
media:content.media:description: Olive skin-friendly tints can help skin look real, smooth, and not cakey on camera.

item.title: How to shave your face | Smooth & clear skin!

item.title: Peach Tones for Under-Eye Neutralizing
item.description: Smitha Deepak shows how peach tones can help neutralize dark under-eyes for a gentle, everyday makeup look.
